title: Hello, World!
excerpt: A look at the massive rebuild of the site—and what’s coming next
content:
## What Changed

V2 is a complete rebuild of the website from the ground up.

**Goodbye Sunrise**  
  When we first launched, we relied on Sunrise’s frontend because it already had the backend systems we needed. Since then, almost everything has been redesigned and rebuilt from scratch.  
  *(No offense to Richard & the Sunrise team — much love <3)*

**Pretty much everything else**  
  Honestly, so much has changed that listing it all would be pointless. The best way to see it is to explore the site yourself.  
  Oh—and yes, we now have this fancy news system. Hi.

## What’s Next

**Short-term**  
  Smaller releases focused on bug fixes and quality-of-life improvements.

**Medium-term**  
  New features like clans, a proper supporter system, and more.

**Long-term**  
  Never doing whatever *that* was again. (Longest three weeks of my life.)

## Fun Facts

- Wooksi still owes me a kebab.
- I am absolutely taking a break after this.

---

Enjoy the new site.
contentHtml:
What Changed

V2 is a complete rebuild of the website from the ground up.

Goodbye Sunrise
When we first launched, we relied on Sunrise’s frontend because it already had the backend systems we needed. Since then, almost everything has been redesigned and rebuilt from scratch.
(No offense to Richard & the Sunrise team — much love <3)

Pretty much everything else
Honestly, so much has changed that listing it all would be pointless. The best way to see it is to explore the site yourself.
Oh—and yes, we now have this fancy news system. Hi.

What’s Next

Short-term
Smaller releases focused on bug fixes and quality-of-life improvements.

Medium-term
New features like clans, a proper supporter system, and more.

Long-term
Never doing whatever that was again. (Longest three weeks of my life.)

Fun Facts

  • Wooksi still owes me a kebab.
  • I am absolutely taking a break after this.

Enjoy the new site.

title: Introducing: Score Hunts!
excerpt: What are Score Hunts, how do they work, and what can you win?
content:
## What is this?

- **Score Hunts** are time-limited events where asteriaAI sets a score on a specific map with specific mods.
- Everyone on the server has a limited window to snipe it.
- By the end of the event, whoever holds the **#1 score** wins the hunt—and the reward.

Think of it as a live competition to snipe each other before time runs out.

## What are the rewards?

We’re still figuring this out.

It’s surprisingly tricky to design rewards when many of the usual perks (like supporter features) are already available for free. That said, we’re exploring ideas such as:

- Temporary cosmetics
- Discord perks and goodies
- Event-exclusive rewards

We’re absolutely open to suggestions—if you have ideas, let us know!

---

Good luck.
contentHtml:
What is this?

  • Score Hunts are time-limited events where asteriaAI sets a score on a specific map with specific mods.
  • Everyone on the server has a limited window to snipe it.
  • By the end of the event, whoever holds the #1 score wins the hunt—and the reward.

Think of it as a live competition to snipe each other before time runs out.

What are the rewards?

We’re still figuring this out.

It’s surprisingly tricky to design rewards when many of the usual perks (like supporter features) are already available for free. That said, we’re exploring ideas such as:

  • Temporary cosmetics
  • Discord perks and goodies
  • Event-exclusive rewards

We’re absolutely open to suggestions—if you have ideas, let us know!

Good luck.

title: Help Us Grow
excerpt: We’re now on the osu! server list—support us with a quick vote!
content:
We’re now on the osu! server list.

If you’d like to support the project, you can vote for us here (it’s completely free and only takes a few seconds):

https://osu-server-list.com/server/himejoshi

Every vote helps more people discover the server and keeps things growing. You can do so daily.

Thanks a ton to everyone who has already voted—we really appreciate it <3
